overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating rain-soaked neon-lit city streets at night. The vehicle transitions from dense commercial districts to elevated highways and complex interchanges, featuring heavy rain, wet reflective roads, and dense cyberpunk architecture with vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city street with digital billboards and crosswalks

events.description: passing through marked pedestrian crosswalk with zebra stripes

agents.ego_description: driving straight through wet city streets, maintaining steady speed through intersections

entered.detail: illuminated building signage with Japanese characters visible on left side of street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
large suspended digital screen displaying advertisements above the road
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and neon accents
yellow metal safety barrier running along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked commercial district at night, with neon-lit buildings lining the street. The vehicle passes over zebra crosswalk markings while digital billboards glow overhead. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant city lights, and yellow guardrails line the right side of the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and overhead signage

events.description: transitioning from city streets onto elevated highway with concrete barriers
navigating gentle right curve on the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto elevated highway section, following the curved road trajectory

entered.detail: continuous yellow metal guardrail along the right edge of the elevated highway
solid concrete divider separating lanes on the left side
large highway sign suspended over the road displaying directional information
white painted text 'SLOW' on the asphalt surface warning drivers to reduce speed

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions onto an elevated highway section, leaving the dense commercial buildings behind. Concrete barriers and yellow guardrails line the multi-lane road, with overhead directional signs visible in the distance. The 'SLOW' road marking indicates a curve ahead as the highway stretches forward through the rainy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level interchange with parking structure and sharp turns

events.description: executing sharp left turn through the interchange ramp
passing through covered parking area with visible parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: navigating tight turns and curves through the complex interchange and parking structure

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking facility with visible levels and parked cars
large cylindrical concrete column supporting the overpass structure
painted directional arrows on road indicating sharp turn direction
illuminated signage for hotel building visible on the left side

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a complex interchange with sharp turns and curved ramps. The vehicle passes under concrete overpasses and alongside a multi-level parking structure. Directional arrows painted on the wet asphalt guide the path through the tight curves, while a hotel sign becomes visible on the left as the scene transitions from open highway to a more enclosed urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon commercial district with heavy digital signage

events.description: exiting interchange back into dense urban area with heavy neon lighting
navigating through moderate traffic with multiple vehicles and neon reflections

agents.ego_description: cruising through the neon-lit downtown district, maneuvering through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving parallel on the left side, maintaining similar speed

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying vibrant pink and purple neon advertisements
large digital screen showing animated commercial content on building facade
tall commercial building covered in illuminated windows and neon accents
ground-level commercial storefront with glowing signage and entrance

segments.scene_description: Returning to the dense urban core, the vehicle drives through a canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers and digital billboards. The wet streets reflect the vibrant pink, purple, and blue neon lights from massive vertical advertisements. Moderate traffic flows through the multi-lane road, with a red sports car visible on the left, while the hotel sign fades into the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked metropolis, transitioning from a neon-lit commercial district to an elevated highway system before returning to a dense urban core. It begins by gliding over zebra crosswalks and past glowing digital billboards, where the wet asphalt mirrors the vibrant city lights beside yellow guardrails. As the vehicle leaves the commercial buildings behind, the scene opens onto an elevated highway characterized by concrete barriers and overhead directional signs that stretch forward into the rainy night. The camera then navigates a complex interchange of sharp turns and curved ramps, passing under concrete overpasses and alongside a multi-level parking structure. Finally, the environment shifts back into a canyon of towering skyscrapers, where the road is flooded with pink and purple reflections from massive vertical advertisements as the vehicle merges with urban traffic.
